title: AI-Driven Fraud Detection Strategies

sections.content: Leveraging unsupervised learning to identify patterns in retail banking ecosystems.
Anomalous transaction detection using clustering algorithms reduces false positives by 68% while catching 99.2% of fraudulent activity.
